Hearing Tests for Adults 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/hearing-tests-for-adults/ 
Hearing Tests for Adults 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What are hearing tests? 
Hearing tests measure how well you are able to hear. They can help diagnose hearing loss , how severe it is, and which part of your hearing isn't working properly.
Hearing depends on a series of steps that change sound waves into electrical signals that your brain understands as sounds. Hearing loss happens where there's a proble
